summary: A clip from an ABC7 news segment. An anchor speaks at a desk in front of a city skyline, with an inset graphic showing a photograph of a bearded man in sunglasses beside a gavel and the caption CARMINE AGNELLO SENTENCED. The segment cuts to footage of a man in a gray suit walking outdoors near a courthouse plaza, and then to a reporter holding an ABC7 microphone in front of a building.

script.scene: An anchor speaks at a desk; an inset graphic shows a man in sunglasses beside a gavel with the caption CARMINE AGNELLO SENTENCED.
Footage shows a man in a gray suit walking outdoors near a courthouse plaza.
A reporter holds an ABC7 microphone in front of a building.
